title: requirements step result
description: Sidecar schema for the requirements workflow step.

ticket.description: JIRA ticket ID as provided by the user (preserves original case)

title.description: First heading from requirements.md (max 80 chars, ticket prefix stripped). Consumed by create_merge_request.sh as PR/MR title.

requirement_count.description: Number of requirements discovered in pass 1. Consumed by orchestrator for `when: has_many_requirements` condition.
